description: You are a Data Warehouse Engineer working with the Chinook digital media database. Management needs to analyze 'sales density'—specifically identifying days with zero revenue to understand sales consistency. Connect to the Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db and create a table named dim_date containing a continuous daily sequence from 2009-01-01 to 2013-12-31. The table must include columns: DateValue (TEXT, format 'YYYY-MM-DD'), Year (INTEGER), Month (INTEGER), MonthName (TEXT), DayOfWeek (TEXT), and IsWeekend (INTEGER: 1 for Saturday/Sunday, 0 otherwise). Create a view named v_monthly_density that joins dim_date with the invoices table, aggregated by Year-Month and sorted by MonthKey ascending. The view must include MonthKey (TEXT, 'YYYY-MM'), TotalDays, ZeroSalesDays (count of days where no invoices occurred), and TotalRevenue (sum of invoice totals). Export the results of the view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/sales_density.csv.
